title: How I Find Faceless YouTube Niches That Make $10-50k/mo

transcript.text: In October 2025, my flagship YouTube channel made me $56,000. I scaled it to over a million followers in less than 8 months. Then, to prove it wasn't luck, we started another channel with a client of mine and scaled it to a million subscribers and $58,000 a month in about [music] 7 months. So, without further ado, let's get straight into the strategy because what most people don't understand is that there are three levels of faceless YouTube. And before choosing your niche, you need to clearly understand where you are. And I want you to think about it as a pyramid. Where at the very bottom, there is a bunch of very, very simple channels. But at the top, there are extremely complicated channels that only a few people can actually manage and run. Think of it like this.
